title: A Weekend in Nilambur
subtitle: The Ultimate 48-Hour Curation
description: A meticulously planned itinerary for those seeking the perfect balance of adventure and tranquility in the valley of teak.

content.text: Begin your journey with a traditional Malabar dinner at Adukkala. The slow-cooked flavors set the tone for a weekend of discovery.
Spend your morning at the Teak Museum and Conolly's Plot. In the afternoon, head to Nedumkayam Rainforest for a guided jungle trail.

title: Hidden Gems of the Valley
subtitle: Beyond the Teak Museum
description: Discover the secret waterfalls and silent viewpoints that only locals know about.

title: Nature & Trails Guide
subtitle: A Trekker's Manifesto
description: A comprehensive guide to the trekking routes of the Western Ghats around Nilambur.
